mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate lower the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, directly increasing S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending power, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in more than 55% of triggered instances, invalidating the negative predictive power.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and business demand expansion, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in both series fails to predict positive 60-day returns with greater than 50% accuracy in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects improving corporate output capacity and inventory replenishment, generating positive short-term S&P 500 momentum.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration yields negative 5-day returns in more than 60% of observations during documented easing periods.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained inflation above the 2.5 percent threshold forces expectations of monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Returns are positive in more than 50% of high-inflation trigger months, breaking the negative correlation.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with falling unemployment rates confirms robust labor market tightening, boosting corporate earnings expectations and driving positive quarterly S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark over 60-day horizons in backtests across multiple cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Higher quarterly real GDP growth directly correlates with stronger corporate revenue fundamentals, generating positive short-term S&P 500 returns as markets price in earnings upgrades.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth shows zero or negative correlation with 5-day forward returns across multiple market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Consecutive monthly declines in industrial production signal supply-side contraction and weakening economic activity, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 65% of instances following two consecutive INDPRO declines.
